decisions.summary: Create 5 beads covering all missing inspector parity items
Reuse existing inspector components (ContainerSection, ReviewPipelineSection) where possible to avoid duplication
Thread agent/issue props through ZoneCOverview to OverviewTab so child tabs can access full agent data

hazards.summary: OverviewTab uses inline styles while inspector uses Tailwind classes — mixing may look inconsistent
hazards.mitigation: Style ContainerSection and pipeline to match command deck aesthetic using inline styles, or wrap inspector components

resumePoint.description: Implement bead workspace-qm53 (Add Containers section with right-click menu to OverviewTab). Add container chips with right-click context menu (restart/stop/start) to OverviewTab tile grid or as a new section. Reuse ContainerSection from inspector/ or create inline equivalent styled for command deck.

beadsMapping.workspace-8k4p: Fix Agent tile: show runtime, uptime, workspace path

sessionHistory.note: Started PAN-953 implementation. Created 5 beads. Rebased onto latest main. No existing continue file.

Completed workspace-8k4p: threaded agent/issue props through IssueWorkbench→ZoneCOverview→OverviewTab. Fixed Agent tile to show actual runtime harness (getHarness), uptime (formatRuntime), friendly model name, and workspace path. Added workspace path to Workspace tile.
